creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
When you re-install the system and run mergemaster and YOU TELL IT TO  
OVERWRITE /etc/mail/mailer.conf to use the base system sendmail, then  
YOU ARE THE ONE WHO BROKE IT.

The port is fine. FreeBSD works as expected.  YOU ARE TELLING IT TO  
OVERWRITE the config file that tells it to use postfix instead of  
base system sendmail.

Close this PR as "pilot error" please.  Thanks.
